---
title: "Data Preparation"
author: "SU Bo-Han"
date: "March 1, 2026"
date-modified: "last-modified"
format: 
  html:
    theme: cosmo  
---

## **Step-by-Step Data Preparation**

### **1. Installing and launching required R packages**

```{r}
#| message: false
#| warning: false
pacman::p_load(ExPanDaR, kableExtra, tidyverse, lubridate)
```

### **2. Loading and merging the data**

```{r}
#| message: false
#| warning: false
df_customers <- read_csv("data/customer_data.csv")    
df_transactions <- read_csv("data/transactions_data.csv") 
```

Since the data was split into two files, we merged them using `customer_id` to complete the dataset for further exploration.

```{r}
str(df_customers)
```

```{r}
str(df_transactions)
```

```{r}
df_transactions <- df_transactions %>%
  mutate(date = as.Date(date))
```

```{r}
df_tx_agg <- df_transactions %>%
  group_by(customer_id) %>%
  summarise(
    raw_tx_count = n(),
    raw_total_amount = sum(amount, na.rm = TRUE),
    raw_avg_amount = mean(amount, na.rm = TRUE),
    raw_median_amount = median(amount, na.rm = TRUE),
    raw_sd_amount = sd(amount, na.rm = TRUE),
    raw_min_amount = min(amount, na.rm = TRUE),
    raw_max_amount = max(amount, na.rm = TRUE),
    raw_first_tx_date = min(date, na.rm = TRUE),
    raw_last_tx_date = max(date, na.rm = TRUE),
    raw_payment_ratio = sum(type == "Payment", na.rm = TRUE) / n(),
    raw_transfer_ratio = sum(type == "Transfer", na.rm = TRUE) / n(),
    raw_withdrawal_ratio = sum(type == "Withdrawal", na.rm = TRUE) / n(),
    raw_active_months = n_distinct(month(date))
  ) %>%
  ungroup()

final_df <- df_customers %>%
  left_join(df_tx_agg, by = "customer_id")

head(final_df)
```

### **3. Dataset overview**

#### **3.1 Unique Location**

```{r}
unique(final_df$location)
```

#### **3.2 Missing values**

```{r}
#| message: false
#| warning: false
missing.values <- final_df %>%
  gather(key = "key", value = "val") %>%
  mutate(is.missing = is.na(val)) %>%
  group_by(key, is.missing) %>%
  summarise(num.missing = n(), .groups = 'drop') %>%
  filter(is.missing == TRUE) %>%
  select(-is.missing) %>%
  arrange(desc(num.missing)) 
missing.values %>% kable()
```

```{r}
#| fig-width: 12
#| fig-height: 8
#| message: false
#| warning: false
missing_values_by_loc <- function(origin, vari = "location"){
  prepare_missing_values_graph(origin, ts_id = vari)
}

missing_values_by_loc(final_df)
```

```{r}
#| fig-width: 12
#| fig-height: 8
final_df <- final_df %>%
  mutate(age_group = case_when(
    age < 20 ~ "Under 20",
    age >= 20 & age < 30 ~ "20-29",
    age >= 30 & age < 40 ~ "30-39",
    age >= 40 & age < 50 ~ "40-49",
    age >= 50 & age < 60 ~ "50-59",
    age >= 60 ~ "60 and above",
    TRUE ~ "Unknown" 
  )) %>%
  mutate(age_group = factor(age_group, levels = c("Under 20", "20-29", "30-39", "40-49", "50-59", "60 and above", "Unknown")))

missing_values_by_age <- function(origin, vari = "age_group"){
  prepare_missing_values_graph(origin, ts_id = vari)
}

missing_values_by_age(final_df)
```

#### **3.3 Treating Missing values**

```{r}
final_df_cleaned <- final_df %>%
  mutate(
    complaint_topics = replace_na(complaint_topics, "No Complaints"),
    feature_requests = replace_na(feature_requests, "No Requests"),
    
    credit_utilization_ratio = case_when(
      is.na(credit_utilization_ratio) & (credit_card == 0 | is.na(credit_card)) ~ 0,
      TRUE ~ credit_utilization_ratio
    )
  )

final_df_cleaned %>%
  summarise(
    NA_complaints = sum(is.na(complaint_topics)),
    NA_requests = sum(is.na(feature_requests)),
    NA_credit = sum(is.na(credit_utilization_ratio))
  ) %>%
  kable(caption = "Missing Values After Imputation") %>%
  kable_styling(bootstrap_options = c("striped", "hover"))
```

```{r}
#| fig-width: 12
#| fig-height: 8
missing_values_by_loc(final_df_cleaned)
```

```{r}
#write_csv(final_df, "colombia_customers_processed.csv")
```

```{r}
nrow(final_df)
```
